content: The drug discovery pipeline follows structured phases: (1) Target validation using genetic, proteomic approaches; (2) High-throughput screening of compound libraries (10,000-100,000+ molecules); (3) Lead optimization improving ADME properties (absorption, distribution, metabolism, excretion); (4) Preclinical IND-enabling studies including toxicology in two species, pharmacokinetics, and formulation development. Success rate from hit to IND submission is approximately 1 in 5,000-10,000 compounds. Modern approaches include structure-based design, AI-driven discovery, and phenotypic screening.
